name: orche
description: Orchestrate multiple agents across git worktrees with a code review UI

scripts.link:cli: pnpm --filter @taranek/orche build && cd packages/cli && pnpm link --global
scripts.dev:cli: cd packages/cli && pnpm link --global && ORCHE_REVIEW_DEV=$PWD/../review pnpm run dev
scripts.dev: pnpm run build:review && pnpm run dev:cli
